calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2002 Off Calendar
